summary: Complete frontend testing of AI Governance consulting website redesign - all user requirements successfully implemented and working
passed_tests: Homepage renders without logo in header as requested
Footer is flat with small logo positioned on far right
Medium logo displayed on right side of home page content area
Navigation works correctly across all 7 pages (HOME, SERVICES, TOOL, FAQ, RESEARCH, ABOUT, CONNECT)
Tool page Step 1: Sector selection with 6 cards in deck style
Tool page Step 2: Questions display one at a time with 8 progress dots
Tool page Results drawer opens on right side
Score ring displays correctly in results drawer
Score calculation works (0% for all 'No' answers)
Recommendations section appears in results drawer
All page loads work without errors
